SapModel.File.NewBlank.parameter_notes: No parameters. Call InitializeNewModel() before this.
SapModel.File.NewBlank.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). No ByRef outputs.

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.description: Define or modify a material by name and type
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatType: int (1=Steel, 2=Concrete, 3=NoDesign, 4=Aluminum, 5=ColdFormed, 6=Rebar, 7=Tendon); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). No ByRef outputs. Minimum required: Name, MatType.

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.description: Set isotropic mechanical properties (E, Poisson, thermal coeff)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); E: float (modulus of elasticity [F/L^2]); U: float (Poisson ratio); A: float (thermal expansion coeff [1/T]); Temp: float (default=0)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial. Returns ret_code (0=success).

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.description: Set weight per unit volume and mass per unit volume
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); MyType: int (1=weight per unit volume [F/L^3], 2=mass per unit volume [M/L^3]); Value: float; Temp: float (default=0)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial. Returns ret_code (0=success). Call twice — once for weight (MyType=1) and once for mass (MyType=2).

SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str (existing material); T3: float (depth/height [L]); T2: float (width [L]); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for concrete beams and columns.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.description: Define a solid circular frame section
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str (existing material); T3: float (diameter [L]); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for piles, drilled shafts, and circular columns.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, TF, TW, T2B, TFB, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str; T3: float (overall depth); T2: float (top flange width); TF: float (top flange thickness); TW: float (web thickness); T2B: float (bottom flange width); TFB: float (bottom flange thickness); Color: int; Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.notes: Supports asymmetric I-sections (different top/bottom flanges). For symmetric use equal T2=T2B and TF=TFB.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.description: Define a rectangular tube (HSS) frame section
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, TF, TW, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str; T3: float (outer depth [L]); T2: float (outer width [L]); TF: float (flange/top+bottom wall thickness [L]); TW: float (web/left+right wall thickness [L]); Color: int; Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for HSS braces, columns, and truss elements.

SapModel.PointObj.AddCartesian.description: Create a point object at Cartesian coordinates

SapModel.FrameObj.AddByPoint.description: Create a frame element between two existing points

SapModel.FrameObj.AddByCoord.description: Add a frame element defined by endpoint coordinates

SapModel.FrameObj.SetSection.description: Assign or change the section property of a frame element
